/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libnumber_converter__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libnumber_converter__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/number_converter__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/number_converter/srv/detail/roman_to_decimal__description.c.o CMakeFiles/number_converter__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/number_converter/srv/detail/roman_to_decimal__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/number_converter__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/number_converter/srv/detail/roman_to_decimal__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
